name: Audit the Stripe account
description: Sam queue job — locate the Manus-connected Stripe account, list active subscriptions / products / payouts, and report findings. Read-only audit.
prompt_template: Sam: locate the Stripe account currently connected (likely via Manus). Use the Stripe API in read-only mode to list: active products, recent payouts (last 90 days), active subscriptions, total fees YTD. Surface anything unexpected. Do NOT modify any Stripe state.
escalation_conditions: no Stripe credentials found — escalate to Jed
notes: Read-only audit. NO financial category set because nothing is written. If this template ever grows a write capability (e.g. cancel a subscription), add categories: ['financial'] which will hard-escalate to Jed via the Nathan bridge.
